title: Elliott 29cm Natural Coconut Fibre FSC Certified Broom Head Replacement with Stiff Bristles – Heavy Duty, Ideal for Indoor Use, Homes, Kitchens and Spring Cleaning, Brown
features: NATURAL COCONUT FIBRE BRUSH: with Stiff, eco friendly Bristles which are a sustainable replacement to synthetic alternatives. Cocos nucifera or Coconut palm husks are responsibly sourced and also reduce waste by being a by product of the food extraction process

TRADITIONAL FSC BROOM HEAD: This forest steward ship broom head with its dual purpose bracket suits everyday needs whilst combating deforestation. Simply attach a new or existing handle and sweep away

MULTISURFACE CLEANING: This versatile broom head can be used in and around the house, be that in the kitchen, whilst gardening, or on the drive, path or patio. This coconut husk broom with its perfectly designed angle will help sweep vast areas with ease
DUAL PURPOSE BRACKET: This expertly designed bracket is made to allow for either push or screw fixing with its combination of a screw thread and a screw or nail hole
ELLIOTT'S: With over 70 years of experience providing excellence in the UK market of Brush ware, you can rest assured that our products will stand the test of time
